meta.description: Curated mapping from brain ROIs to music perception traits. Based on published meta-analyses of music and auditory neuroscience.
meta.disclaimer: These mappings reflect consensus from peer-reviewed literature. Individual brains vary. Scores are predictions, not measurements.
sources: Zatorre et al. 2007 - Neural specializations for music
Koelsch 2014 - Brain correlates of music-evoked emotions
Trost et al. 2012 - Mapping aesthetic musical emotions in the brain
Grahn & Brett 2007 - Rhythm and beat perception in motor areas

regions.trait_description: Sensitivity to timbral complexity, harmonic richness, and spectral detail
regions.annotation: Processes raw sound — texture, timbre, harmonic content
regions.timing_insight_template: Active here = the ear is working hard at this moment

regions.trait_description: Processing of pitch patterns, melodic contour, and harmonic progression
regions.annotation: Tracks melody and pitch — where the brain follows the song
regions.timing_insight_template: Lighting up here = strong melodic pull at this point

regions.trait_description: Motor system engagement predicting urge to move, tap, or dance
regions.annotation: Controls movement — activates when music makes you want to move
regions.timing_insight_template: Motor cortex before a hook = the body knows it's coming

regions.annotation: Plans movement before it happens — rhythmic anticipation
regions.timing_insight_template: Active here = brain anticipating the next beat

regions.trait_description: Internal rhythm generation and beat prediction
regions.annotation: Generates internal rhythm — the brain's metronome
regions.timing_insight_template: Lit up = the groove is locked in here

regions.trait_description: Emotional arousal response to musical tension, dissonance, and surprise
regions.annotation: Emotion center — responds to tension, surprise, and release
regions.timing_insight_template: Firing here = something emotionally charged at this moment

regions.trait_description: Dopaminergic reward response — musical chills, anticipation payoff, hook satisfaction
regions.annotation: Dopamine reward center — chills, payoff, hook satisfaction
regions.timing_insight_template: Active = the brain is releasing dopamine right here

regions.trait_description: Familiarity processing, musical memory formation, nostalgic response
regions.annotation: Memory formation — links music to past experiences
regions.timing_insight_template: Lit here = this section may encode as a strong memory

regions.trait_description: Interoceptive awareness — felt bodily response to music (chills, tension, release)
regions.annotation: Body awareness — where you feel music physically
regions.timing_insight_template: Active = a felt physical response at this moment

regions.trait_description: Conflict monitoring — engagement with unexpected harmonic or rhythmic events
regions.annotation: Monitors conflict — activates on harmonic surprise or rhythm breaks

regions.trait_description: Higher-order music structure processing — form, narrative arc, compositional complexity
regions.annotation: Processes song structure — narrative arc, arrangement decisions
regions.timing_insight_template: Lit up = brain parsing the larger structure of the song

regions.annotation: The brain's timing engine — millisecond rhythm tracking
regions.timing_insight_template: Active here = tight rhythmic precision at this moment
